source_item.title: Reliance Retail Q1 results: Quick-commerce spends drag PAT 14% YoY to Rs 2,806 crore; revenue rises 7%

slide1_hook.label: Reliance Profit Drops 14% On Quick Commerce
slide1_hook.subhead: Revenue rose 7%, but quick-commerce spending ate into profit.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: JioMart's Rocky Road To Quick Commerce
slide2_backstory.body: Reliance's first quick delivery bet, JioMart Express, launched in 2022 and shut down by 2023. It relaunched in late 2024 with zero delivery fees, aiming to take on Blinkit, Zepto, and Swiggy Instamart.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Q1 FY27: Revenue Up, Profit Down 14%
slide3_news.body: Reliance Retail's Q1 revenue rose 7.4% to Rs 90,408 crore, but net profit fell 14.2% to Rs 2,806 crore. Quick commerce spending weighed on margins, even as the company added 252 new stores.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: The Bet: Trade Margin For Market Share
bullets: JioMart is closing in on India's #2 spot
Zero fees signal a price war, not a feature
Plans to double retail EBITDA in three years
Digital now drives over a quarter of fashion sales

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Reliance is taking a 14% profit hit to chase quick commerce share from Blinkit and Zepto. Smart long game, or margin bleed that never stops?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily breakdowns of India's biggest business stories.
